of successful authentications */\n141\t  successfulAuths: number;\n142\t  /** Last risk assessment */\n143\t  lastRiskAssessment?: SessionRiskAssessment;\n144\t}\n145\t\n146\t// ============================================================================\n147\t// IP Address Utilities\n148\t// ============================================================================\n149\t\n150\t/**\n151\t * Parse an IP address into its components.\n152\t */\n153\texport function parseIpAddress(ip: string): IpInfo {\n154\t  if (ip.includes(\".\")) {\n155\t    // IPv4\n156\t    const octets = ip.split(\".\").map((n) => parseInt(n, 10));\n157\t\n158\t    return {\n159\t      ip,\n160\t      type: \"ipv4\",\n161\t      octets,\n162\t      isPrivate: isPrivateIpv4(octets),\n163\t      isLoopback: octets[0] === 127,\n164\t    };\n165\t  }\n166\t\n167\t  if (ip.includes(\":\")) {\n168\t    // IPv6\n169\t    const hextets = ip.split(\":\");\n170\t\n171\t    return {\n172\t      ip,\n173\t      type: \"ipv6\",\n174\t      hextets,\n175\t      isPrivate: ip.startsWith(\"fc\") || ip.startsWith(\"fd\") || ip.startsWith(\"fe80\"),\n176\t      isLoopback: ip === \"::1\",\n177\t    };\n178\t  }\n179\t\n180\t  return {\n181\t    ip,\n182\t    type: \"unknown\",\n183\t    isPrivate: false,\n184\t    isLoopback: false,\n185\t  };\n186\t}\n187\t\n188\t/**\n189\t * Check if IPv4 address is private.\n190\t */\n191\tfunction isPrivateIpv4(octets: number[]): boolean {\n192\t  const [first, second] = octets;\n193\t\n194\t  // 10.0.0.0/8\n195\t  if (first === 10) return true;\n196\t\n197\t  // 172.16.0.0/12\n198\t  if (first === 172 && second >= 16 && second <= 31) return true;\n199\t\n200\t  // 192.168.0.0/16\n201\t  if (first === 192 && second === 168) return true;\n202\t\n203\t  // 169.254.0.0/16 (link-local)\n204\t  if (first === 169 && second === 254) return true;\n205\t\n206\t  return false;\n207\t}\n208\t\n209\t/**\n210\t * Check if two IP addresses are in the same subnet.\n211\t *\n212\t * For IPv4, checks the specified number of leading octets.\n213\t * For IPv6, checks the specified number of leading hextets.\n214\t */\n215\texport function areIpsInSameSubnet(ip1: string, ip2: string, prefixLength = 24): boolean {\n216\t  const info1 = parseIpAddress(ip1);\n217\t  const info2 = parseIpAddress(ip2);\n218\t\n219\t  if (info1.type !== info2.type || info1.type === \"unknown\") {\n220\t    return false;\n221\t  }\n222\t\n223\t  if (info1.type === \"ipv4\" && info1.octets && info2.octets) {\n224\t    // For IPv4, prefixLength / 8 gives number of octets to compare\n225\t    const octetsToCompare = Math.floor(prefixLength / 8);\n226\t\n227\t    for (let i = 0; i < octetsToCompare && i < 4; i++) {\n228\t      if (info1.octets[i] !== info2.octets[i]) {\n229\t        return false;\n230\t      }\n231\t    }\n232\t\n233\t    // Check remaining bits\n234\t    const remainingBits = prefixLength % 8;\n235\t    if (remainingBits > 0 && octetsToCompare < 4) {\n236\t      const mask = 256 - Math.pow(2, 8 - remainingBits);\n237\t      if ((info1.octets[octetsToCompare]! & mask) !== (info2.octets[octetsToCompare]! & mask)) {\n238\t        return false;\n239\t      }\n240\t    }\n241\t\n242\t    return true;\n243\t  }\n244\t\n245\t  if (info1.type === \"ipv6\" && info1.hextets && info2.hextets) {\n246\t    // For IPv6, prefixLength / 16 gives number of hextets to compare\n247\t    const hextetsToCompare = Math.floor(prefixLength / 16);\n248\t\n249\t    for (let i = 0; i < hextetsToCompare && i < 8; i++) {\n250\t      if (info1.hextets[i] !== info2.hextets[i]) {\n251\t        return false;\n252\t      }\n253\t    }\n254\t\n255\t    return true;\n256\t  }\n257\t\n258\t  return false;\n259\t}\n260\t\n261\t/**\n262\t * Calculate the distance between two IP addresses.\n263\t *\n264\t * Returns a normalized \"distance\" value (0-100) based on how different the IPs are.\n265\t * Useful for detecting proxy/VPN changes vs. location changes.\n266\t */\n267\texport function calculateIpDistance(ip1: string, ip2: string): number {\n268\t  const info1 = parseIpAddress(ip1);\n269\t  const info2 = parseIpAddress(ip2);\n270\t\n271\t  if (info1.type !== info2.type || info1.type === \"unknown\") {\n272\t    return 100; // Maximum distance for different IP types\n273\t  }\n274\t\n275\t  if (info1.type === \"ipv4\" && info1.octets && info2.octets) {\n276\t    // Calculate difference for each octet\n277\t    let totalDiff = 0;\n278\t    for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {\n279\t      totalDiff += Math.abs(info1.octets[i]! - info2.octets[i]!);\n280\t    }\n281\t\n282\t    // Normalize to 0-100\n283\t    return Math.min(100, Math.floor(totalDiff / 2.55));\n284\t  }\n285\t\n286\t  return 50; // Middle distance for IPv6 (simplified)\n287\t}\n288\t\n289\t/**\n290\t * Get a simplified IP class for grouping.\n291\t *\n292\t * Returns \"A\", \"B\", \"C\" class for IPv4, useful for coarse-grained comparison.\n293\t */\n294\texport function getIpClass(ip: string): string {\n295\t  const info = parseIpAddress(ip);\n296\t\n297\t  if (info.type === \"ipv4\" && info.octets) {\n298\t    const [first] = info.octets;\n299\t\n300\t    if (first < 128) return \"A\";\n301\t    if (first < 192) return \"B\";\n302\t    return \"C\";\n303\t  }\n304\t\n305\t  return \"unknown\";\n306\t}\n307\t\n308\t// ============================================================================\n309\t// User Agent Analysis\n310\t// ============================================================================\n311\t\n312\t/**\n313\t * Analyze a user agent string.\n314\t */\n315\texport function analyzeUserAgent(userAgent: string): UserAgentInfo {\n316\t  const ua = userAgent.toLowerCase();\n317\t  const info: UserAgentInfo = {\n318\t    raw: userAgent,\n319\t    deviceType: \"unknown\",\n320\t  };\n321\t\n322\t  // Detect browser\n323\t  if (ua.includes(\"edg/\") || ua.includes(\"edge/\")) {\n324\t    info.browser = \"edge\";\n325\t  } else if (ua.includes(\"opr/\") || ua.includes(\"opera/\")) {\n326\t    info.browser = \"opera\";\n327\t  } else if (ua.includes(\"brave/\")) {\n328\t    info.browser = \"brave\";\n329\t  } else if (ua.includes(\"chrome/\") && !ua.includes(\"edg\")) {\n330\t    info.browser = \"chrome\";\n331\t  } else if (ua.includes(\"safari/\") && !ua.includes(\"chrome\")) {\n332\t    info.browser = \"safari\";\n333\t  } else if (ua.includes(\"firefox/\")) {\n334\t    info.browser = \"firefox\";\n335\t  } else if (ua.includes(\"trident/\") || ua.includes(\"msie\")) {\n336\t    info.browser = \"ie\";\n337\t  }\n338\t\n339\t  // Detect OS\n340\t  if (ua.includes(\"windows\")) {\n341\t    info.os = \"windows\";\n342\t    if (ua.includes(\"windows nt 10.0\")) info.osVersion = \"10\";\n343\t    else if (ua.includes(\"windows nt 6.3\")) info.osVersion = \"8.1\";\n344\t    else if (ua.includes(\"windows nt 6.1\")) info.osVersion = \"7\";\n345\t  } else if (ua.includes(\"iphone\") || ua.includes(\"ipad\") || ua.includes(\"ipod\")) {\n346\t    info.os = \"ios\";\n347\t  } else if (ua.includes(\"android\")) {\n348\t    info.os = \"android\";\n349\t  } else if (ua.includes(\"mac os x\") || ua.includes(\"macos\")) {\n350\t    info.os = \"macos\";\n351\t  } else if (ua.includes(\"linux\")) {\n352\t    info.os = \"linux\";\n353\t  }\n354\t\n355\t  // Detect device type\n356\t  if (/bot|crawl|spider|slurp|curl|wget/i.test(userAgent)) {\n357\t    info.deviceType = \"bot\";\n358\t  } else if (/tablet|ipad|playbook|silk/i.test(ua)) {\n359\t    info.deviceType = \"tablet\";\n360\t  } else if (/mobile|android|iphone|ipod|blackberry|iemobile|opera mini/i.test(ua)) {\n361\t    info.deviceType = \"mobile\";\n362\t  } else if (info.os) {\n363\t    info.deviceType = \"desktop\";\n364\t  }\n365\t\n366\t  // Detect hardware\n367\t  if (ua.includes(\"arm\")) {\n368\t    info.hardware = \"arm\";\n369\t  } else if (ua.includes(\"x86_64\") || ua.includes(\"x64\") || ua.includes(\"wow64\")) {\n370\t    info.hardware = \"x64\";\n371\t  } else if (ua.includes(\"i686\") || ua.includes(\"x86\")) {\n372\t    info.hardware = \"x86\";\n373\t  }\n374\t\n375\t  return info;\n376\t}\n377\t\n378\t/**\n379\t * Calculate similarity between two user agent strings.\n380\t *\n381\t * Returns 0-100 similarity score.\n382\t */\n383\texport function calculateUserAgentSimilarity(ua1: string, ua2: string): number {\n384\t  const info1 = analyzeUserAgent(ua1);\n385\t  const info2 = analyzeUserAgent(ua2);\n386\t\n387\t  let similarity = 0;\n388\t  let factors = 0;\n389\t\n390\t  // Browser match\n391\t  if (info1.browser === info2.browser) {\n392\t    similarity += 30;\n393\t  }\n394\t  factors++;\n395\t\n396\t  // OS match\n397\t  if (info1.os === info2.os) {\n398\t    similarity += 30;\n399\t  }\n400\t  factors++;\n401\t\n402\t  // Device type match\n403\t  if (info1.deviceType === info2.deviceType) {\n404\t    similarity += 20;\n405\t  }\n406\t  factors++;\n407\t\n408\t  // Hardware match\n409\t  if (info1.hardware === info2.hardware) {\n410\t    similarity += 20;\n411\t  }\n412\t  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars\n413\t  factors++;\n414\t\n415\t  return Math.min(100, similarity);\n416\t}\n417\t\n418\t/**\n419\t * Detect if user agent change is legitimate.\n420\t *\n421\t * Returns true if the change is likely a browser update or minor version change.\n422\t */\n423\texport function isLegitimateUserAgentChange(oldUa: string, newUa: string): boolean {\n424\t  const oldInfo = analyzeUserAgent(oldUa);\n425\t  const newInfo = analyzeUserAgent(newUa);\n426\t\n427\t  // Same browser and OS is likely a version update\n428\t  if (oldInfo.browser === newInfo.browser && oldInfo.os === newInfo.os) {\n429\t    return true;\n430\t  }\n431\t\n432\t  // Same device type with different browser could be user trying new browser\n433\t  if (oldInfo.deviceType === newInfo.deviceType && oldInfo.os === newInfo.os) {\n434\t    return true;\n435\t  }\n436\t\n437\t  return false;\n438\t}\n439\t\n440\t// ============================================================================\n441\t// Session Risk Assessment\n442\t// ============================================================================\n443\t\n444\t/**\n445\t * Security event tracking for session risk scoring.\n446\t */\n447\tconst sessionSecurityEvents = new Map<string, SecurityEvent[]>();\n448\t\n449\t/**\n450\t * Assess session security risk.\n451\t *\n452\t * Analyzes a session and current request to calculate a risk score.\n453\t */\n454\texport async function assessSessionRisk(\n455\t  session: AuthSession,\n456\t  currentIp: string,\n457\t  currentUserAgent?: string,\n458\t  options: {\n459\t    /** Time window for event history (ms) */\n460\t    eventHistoryWindow?: number;\n461\t    /** Whether to include geolocation checks */\n462\t    includeGeolocation?: boolean;\n463\t    /** Known geolocation data (optional) */\n464\t    knownGeo?: (ip: string) => Promise<GeolocationData | null>;\n465\t  } = {}\n466\t): Promise<SessionRiskAssessment> {\n467\t  const {\n468\t    eventHistoryWindow = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000, // 24 hours\n469\t    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars\n470\t    includeGeolocation = false,\n471\t    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars\n472\t    knownGeo,\n473\t  } = options;\n474\t\n475\t  const riskFactors: string[] = [];\n476\t  const events: SecurityEvent[] = [];\n477\t  let riskScore = 0;\n478\t\n479\t  const now = Date.now();\n480\t\n481\t  // Get recent security events for this session\n482\t  const recentEvents = (sessionSecurityEvents.get(session.sessionId) || []).filter(\n483\t    (e) => now - e.timestamp < eventHistoryWindow\n484\t  );\n485\t\n486\t  // Check IP change\n487\t  if (session.clientIp !== currentIp) {\n488\t    const ipInfo = parseIpAddress(currentIp);\n489\t    const oldIpInfo = parseIpAddress(session.clientIp);\n490\t\n491\t    if (ipInfo.type !== oldIpInfo.type) {\n492\t      riskScore += 40;\n493\t      riskFactors.push(\"IP address type changed (IPv4 ↔ IPv6)\");\n494\t      events.push({\n495\t        type: \"ip_type_change\",\n496\t        timestamp: now,\n497\t        score: 40,\n498\t        details: { oldIp: session.clientIp, newIp: currentIp },\n499\t      });\n500\t    } else if (!areIpsInSameSubnet(session.clientIp, currentIp, 24)) {\n501\t      riskScore += 30;\n502\t      riskFactors.push(\"IP address changed to different subnet\");\n503\t      events.push({\n504\t        type: \"ip_subnet_change\",\n505\t        timestamp: now,\n506\t        score: 30,\n507\t        details: { oldIp: session.clientIp, newIp: currentIp },\n508\t      });\n509\t    } else {\n510\t      riskScore += 10;\n511\t      riskFactors.push(\"IP address changed within same subnet\");\n512\t      events.push({\n513\t        type: \"ip_change_same_subnet\",\n514\t        timestamp: now,\n515\t        score: 10,\n516\t        details: { oldIp: session.clientIp, newIp: currentIp },\n517\t      });\n518\t    }\n519\t  }\n520\t\n521\t  // Check User-Agent change\n522\t  if (currentUserAgent && session.userAgent && session.userAgent !== currentUserAgent) {\n523\t    const similarity = calculateUserAgentSimilarity(session.userAgent, currentUserAgent);\n524\t\n525\t    if (similarity < 50) {\n526\t      riskScore += 30;\n527\t      riskFactors.push(\"User-Agent changed significantly\");\n528\t      events.push({\n529\t        type: \"ua_change_major\",\n530\t        timestamp: now,\n531\t        score: 30,\n532\t        details: { oldUa: session.userAgent, newUa: currentUserAgent, similarity },\n533\t      });\n534\t    } else if (!isLegitimateUserAgentChange(session.userAgent, currentUserAgent)) {\n535\t      riskScore += 15;\n536\t      riskFactors.push(\"User-Agent changed (possibly suspicious)\");\n537\t      events.push({\n538\t        type: \"ua_change_minor\",\n539\t        timestamp: now,\n540\t        score: 15,\n541\t        details: { oldUa: session.userAgent, newUa: currentUserAgent },\n542\t      });\n543\t    }\n544\t  }\n545\t\n546\t  // Check session age (very new sessions are higher risk)\n547\t  const sessionAge = now - session.createdAt;\n548\t  if (sessionAge < 5 * 60 * 1000) {\n549\t    // Less than 5 minutes old\n550\t    riskScore += 5;\n551\t    riskFactors.push(\"Very new session\");\n552\t  }\n553\t\n554\t  // Check idle time (long idle may indicate hijacking)\n555\t  const idleTime = now - session.lastActivityAt;\n556\t  if (idleTime > 60 * 60 * 1000) {\n557\t    // More than 1 hour idle\n558\t    riskScore += 10;\n559\t    riskFactors.push(\"Long idle time before activity\");\n560\t  }\n561\t\n562\t  // Include recent security events\n563\t  for (const event of recentEvents) {\n564\t    riskScore += event.score;\n565\t    events.push(event);\n566\t  }\n567\t\n568\t  // Cap risk score at 100\n569\t  riskScore = Math.min(100, riskScore);\n570\t\n571\t  // Determine risk level\n572\t  let riskLevel: \"low\" | \"medium\" | \"high\" | \"critical\";\n573\t  let recommendedAction: \"allow\" | \"monitor\" | \"challenge\" | \"block\";\n574\t\n575\t  if (riskScore < 20) {\n576\t    riskLevel = \"low\";\n577\t    recommendedAction = \"allow\";\n578\t  } else if (riskScore < 50) {\n579\t    riskLevel = \"medium\";\n580\t    recommendedAction = \"monitor\";\n581\t  } else if (riskScore < 80) {\n582\t    riskLevel = \"high\";\n583\t    recommendedAction = \"challenge\";\n584\t  } else {\n585\t    riskLevel = \"critical\";\n586\t    recommendedAction = \"block\";\n587\t  }\n588\t\n589\t  return {\n590\t    riskScore,\n591\t    riskLevel,\n592\t    riskFactors,\n593\t    recommendedAction,\n594\t    events,\n595\t  };\n596\t}\n597\t\n598\t/**\n599\t * Record a security event for a session.\n600\t */\n601\texport function recordSecurityEvent(sessionId: string, event: SecurityEvent): void {\n602\t  const events = sessionSecurityEvents.get(sessionId) || [];\n603\t  events.push(event);\n604\t\n605\t  // Keep only last 100 events per session\n606\t  if (events.length > 100) {\n607\t    events.shift();\n608\t  }\n609\t\n610\t  sessionSecurityEvents.set(sessionId, events);\n611\t\n612\t  logger.debug(\"Security event recorded\", {\n613\t    sessionId,\n614\t    eventType: event.type,\n615\t    score: event.score,\n616\t  });\n617\t}\n618\t\n619\t/**\n620\t * Clear security events for a session.\n621\t */\n622\texport function clearSecurityEvents(sessionId: string): void {\n623\t  sessionSecurityEvents.delete(sessionId);\n624\t}\n625\t\n626\t// ============================================================================\n627\t// Device Trust Management\n628\t// ============================================================================\n629\t\n630\t/**\n631\t * Device trust storage.\n632\t */\n633\tconst deviceTrustStorage = new Map<string, DeviceTrustInfo>();\n634\t\n635\t/**\n636\t * Get or create device trust info.\n637\t */\n638\texport function getOrCreateDeviceTrust(\n639\t  deviceId: string,\n640\t  initialRiskAssessment?: SessionRiskAssessment\n641\t): DeviceTrustInfo {\n642\t  const existing = deviceTrustStorage.get(deviceId);\n643\t\n644\t  if (existing) {\n645\t    return existing;\n646\t  }\n647\t\n648\t  const trustInfo: DeviceTrustInfo = {\n649\t    deviceId,\n650\t    trustLevel: \"unknown\",\n651\t    firstSeenAt: Date.now(),\n652\t    lastSeenAt: Date.now(),\n653\t    successfulAuths: 0,\n654\t    lastRiskAssessment: initialRiskAssessment,\n655\t  };\n656\t\n657\t  deviceTrustStorage.set(deviceId, trustInfo);\n658\t\n659\t  logger.info(\"New device trust record created\", { deviceId });\n660\t\n661\t  return trustInfo;\n662\t}\n663\t\n664\t/**\n665\t * Update device trust based on successful authentication.\n666\t */\n667\texport function updateDeviceTrust(deviceId: string, riskAssessment?: SessionRiskAssessment): void {\n668\t  const trustInfo = getOrCreateDeviceTrust(deviceId, riskAssessment);\n669\t\n670\t  // Ensure lastSeenAt is always at least 1ms after firstSeenAt\n671\t  const now = Date.now();\n672\t  trustInfo.lastSeenAt = Math.max(now, trustInfo.firstSeenAt + 1);\n673\t  trustInfo.successfulAuths++;\n674\t  trustInfo.lastRiskAssessment = riskAssessment;\n675\t\n676\t  // Auto-promote trust based on successful auths\n677\t  if (trustInfo.successfulAuths >= 10 && trustInfo.trustLevel !== \"highly_trusted\") {\n678\t    trustInfo.trustLevel = \"highly_trusted\";\n679\t    logger.info(\"Device promoted to highly trusted\", { deviceId });\n680\t  } else if (trustInfo.successfulAuths >= 5 && trustInfo.trustLevel === \"unknown\") {\n681\t    trustInfo.trustLevel = \"trusted\";\n682\t    logger.info(\"Device promoted to trusted\", { deviceId });\n683\t  } else if (riskAssessment && riskAssessment.riskLevel === \"high\") {\n684\t    trustInfo.trustLevel = \"untrusted\";\n685\t    logger.warn(\"Device marked as untrusted due to high risk\", { deviceId });\n686\t  }\n687\t\n688\t  deviceTrustStorage.set(deviceId, trustInfo);\n689\t}\n690\t\n691\t/**\n692\t * Check if a device is trusted.\n693\t */\n694\texport function isDeviceTrusted(deviceId: string): boolean {\n695\t  const trustInfo = deviceTrustStorage.get(deviceId);\n696\t  return trustInfo?.trustLevel === \"trusted\" || trustInfo?.trustLevel === \"highly_trusted\";\n697\t}\n698\t\n699\t/**\n700\t * Get device trust level.\n701\t */\n702\texport function getDeviceTrustLevel(deviceId: string): DeviceTrustLevel {\n703\t  return deviceTrustStorage.get(deviceId)?.trustLevel || \"unknown\";\n704\t}\n705\t\n706\t/**\n707\t * Manually set device trust level.\n708\t */\n709\texport function setDeviceTrustLevel(deviceId: string, trustLevel: DeviceTrustLevel): void {\n710\t  const trustInfo = getOrCreateDeviceTrust(deviceId);\n711\t  trustInfo.trustLevel = trustLevel;\n712\t  deviceTrustStorage.set(deviceId, trustInfo);\n713\t\n714\t  logger.info(\"Device trust level manually set\", { deviceId, trustLevel });\n715\t}\n716\t\n717\t/**\n718\t * Remove device trust record.\n719\t */\n720\texport function removeDeviceTrust(deviceId: string): void {\n721\t  deviceTrustStorage.delete(deviceId);\n722\t  logger.info(\"Device trust record removed\", { deviceId });\n723\t}\n724\t\n725\t// ============================================================================\n726\t// Impossible Travel Detection\n727\t// ============================================================================\n728\t\n729\t/**\n730\t * Maximum plausible travel speed (km/h).\n731\t * Commercial jets fly at ~900 km/h, so anything faster is suspicious.\n732\t */\n733\tconst MAX_PLAUSIBLE_SPEED_KMH = 900;\n734\t\n735\t/**\n736\t * Check for impossible travel between two locations.\n737\t *\n738\t * Compares the time between two events with the distance between\n739\t * their locations to detect impossible travel scenarios.\n740\t */\n741\texport async function detectImpossibleTravel(\n742\t  event1: { timestamp: number; ip: string; geo?: GeolocationData },\n743\t  event2: { timestamp: number; ip: string; geo?: GeolocationData },\n744\t  options: {\n745\t    /** Maximum plausible speed (km/h) */\n746\t    maxSpeedKmh?: number;\n747\t    /** Geolocation lookup function */\n748\t    geoLookup?: (ip: string) => Promise<GeolocationData | null>;\n749\t  } = {}\n750\t): Promise<{ impossible: boolean; speed?: number; distance?: number }> {\n751\t  const { maxSpeedKmh = MAX_PLAUSIBLE_SPEED_KMH, geoLookup } = options;\n752\t\n753\t  // Ensure event1 is earlier\n754\t  const [earlier, later] =\n755\t    event1.timestamp < event2.timestamp ? [event1, event2] : [event2, event1];\n756\t\n757\t  // Get geolocation data\n758\t  const geo1 = event1.geo || (geoLookup ? await geoLookup(event1.ip) : null);\n759\t  const geo2 = event2.geo || (geoLookup ? await geoLookup(event2.ip) : null);\n760\t\n761\t  if (!geo1 || !geo2 || !geo1.latitude || !geo1.longitude || !geo2.latitude || !geo2.longitude) {\n762\t    // Can't determine without geolocation\n763\t    return { impossible: false };\n764\t  }\n765\t\n766\t  // Calculate distance using Haversine formula\n767\t  const distance = calculateDistance(geo1.latitude, geo1.longitude, geo2.latitude, geo2.longitude);\n768\t\n769\t  // Calculate time difference in hours\n770\t  const timeDiffHours = (later.timestamp - earlier.timestamp) / (1000 * 60 * 60);\n771\t\n772\t  if (timeDiffHours <= 0) {\n773\t    // Events at the same time or reversed timestamps\n774\t    return { impossible: false };\n775\t  }\n776\t\n777\t  // Calculate required speed\n778\t  const speed = distance / timeDiffHours;\n779\t\n780\t  if (speed > maxSpeedKmh) {\n781\t    return { impossible: true, speed, distance };\n782\t  }\n783\t\n784\t  return { impossible: false, speed, distance };\n785\t}\n786\t\n787\t/**\n788\t * Calculate distance between two coordinates using the Haversine formula.\n789\t *\n790\t * Returns distance in kilometers.\n791\t */\n792\texport function calculateDistance(lat1: number, lon1: number, lat2: number, lon2: number): number {\n793\t  const R = 6371; // Earth's radius in km\n794\t  const dLat = toRadians(lat2 - lat1);\n795\t  const dLon = toRadians(lon2 - lon1);\n796\t\n797\t  const a =\n798\t    Math.sin(dLat / 2) * Math.sin(dLat / 2) +\n799\t    Math.cos(toRadians(lat1)) * Math.cos(toRadians(lat2)) * Math.sin(dLon / 2) * Math.sin(dLon / 2);\n800\t\n801\t  const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));\n802\t\n803\t  return R * c;\n804\t}\n805\t\n806\t/**\n807\t * Convert degrees to radians.\n808\t */\n809\tfunction toRadians(degrees: number): number {\n810\t  return degrees * (Math.PI / 180);\n811\t}\n812\t\n813\t// ============================================================================\n814\t// Middleware Integration\n815\t// ============================================================================\n816\t\n817\t/**\n818\t * Session security middleware options.\n819\t */\n820\texport interface SessionSecurityMiddlewareOptions {\n821\t  /** Whether to enforce IP binding */\n822\t  enforceIpBinding?: boolean;\n823\t  /** Whether to check user agent changes */\n824\t  checkUserAgent?: boolean;\n825\t  /** Risk threshold for blocking (0-100) */\n826\t  riskThreshold?: number;\n827\t  /** Whether to require re-authentication on high risk */\n828\t  reauthOnHighRisk?: boolean;\n829\t}\n830\t\n831\t/**\n832\t * Session security middleware.\n833\t *\n834\t * Enhances session validation with risk assessment and additional security checks.\n835\t */\n836\texport function sessionSecurity(options: SessionSecurityMiddlewareOptions = {}) {\n837\t  const {\n838\t    enforceIpBinding = true,\n839\t    checkUserAgent = true,\n840\t    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars\n841\t    riskThreshold = 80,\n842\t    reauthOnHighRisk = true,\n843\t  } = options;\n844\t\n845\t  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\n846\t  return async (c: any, next: any) => {\n847\t    const session = c.get(\"session\");\n848\t    if (!session) {\n849\t      return next();\n850\t    }\n851\t\n852\t    const clientIp =\n853\t      c.req.header(\"CF-Connecting-IP\") ||\n854\t      c.req.header(\"X-Forwarded-For\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() ||\n855\t      c.req.header(\"X-Real-IP\") ||\n856\t      \"unknown\";\n857\t\n858\t    const userAgent = c.req.header(\"User-Agent\");\n859\t\n860\t    // Enforce IP binding if enabled and session has ipBinding set\n861\t    if (enforceIpBinding && session.ipBinding && session.clientIp) {\n862\t      // Check if IP is in the same /24 subnet (allows for DHCP changes within same network)\n863\t      const ipInfo = parseIpAddress(clientIp);\n864\t      const sessionIpInfo = parseIpAddress(session.clientIp);\n865\t\n866\t      if (ipInfo.type === sessionIpInfo.type && ipInfo.type === \"ipv4\") {\n867\t        // For IPv4, check if within same /24 subnet (first 3 octets match)\n868\t        const ipsInSameSubnet = areIpsInSameSubnet(session.clientIp, clientIp, 24);\n869\t\n870\t        if (!ipsInSameSubnet) {\n871\t          securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n872\t            c,\n873\t            \"ip_binding_violation\",\n874\t            `Session IP binding violation: ${session.clientIp} -> ${clientIp}`\n875\t          );\n876\t          throw new Error(\"Session IP binding violation - session terminated\");\n877\t        }\n878\t      } else if (ipInfo.type === sessionIpInfo.type && ipInfo.type === \"ipv6\") {\n879\t        // For IPv6, check if within same /64 subnet\n880\t        const ipsInSameSubnet = areIpsInSameSubnet(session.clientIp, clientIp, 64);\n881\t\n882\t        if (!ipsInSameSubnet) {\n883\t          securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n884\t            c,\n885\t            \"ip_binding_violation\",\n886\t            `Session IP binding violation: ${session.clientIp} -> ${clientIp}`\n887\t          );\n888\t          throw new Error(\"Session IP binding violation - session terminated\");\n889\t        }\n890\t      } else if (ipInfo.type !== sessionIpInfo.type) {\n891\t        // IP type changed (IPv4 <-> IPv6)\n892\t        securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n893\t          c,\n894\t          \"ip_type_change\",\n895\t          `Session IP type change: ${sessionIpInfo.type} -> ${ipInfo.type}`\n896\t        );\n897\t        throw new Error(\"Session IP type changed - session terminated\");\n898\t      }\n899\t    }\n900\t\n901\t    // Check User-Agent changes if enabled\n902\t    if (checkUserAgent && session.userAgent && userAgent !== session.userAgent) {\n903\t      const similarity = calculateUserAgentSimilarity(session.userAgent, userAgent);\n904\t\n905\t      // Significant user agent change without being a legitimate update\n906\t      if (similarity < 50 && !isLegitimateUserAgentChange(session.userAgent, userAgent)) {\n907\t        securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n908\t          c,\n909\t          \"user_agent_change\",\n910\t          `Suspicious User-Agent change detected`\n911\t        );\n912\t        // Log but don't necessarily block - will be factored into risk assessment\n913\t      }\n914\t    }\n915\t\n916\t    // Assess session risk\n917\t    const riskAssessment = await assessSessionRisk(session, clientIp, userAgent);\n918\t\n919\t    // Attach risk assessment to context\n920\t    c.set(\"sessionRiskAssessment\", riskAssessment);\n921\t\n922\t    // Take action based on risk level\n923\t    if (riskAssessment.recommendedAction === \"block\") {\n924\t      securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n925\t        c,\n926\t        \"high_risk_session_blocked\",\n927\t        `Session blocked due to high risk score: ${riskAssessment.riskScore}`\n928\t      );\n929\t      throw new Error(\"Session blocked due to suspicious activity\");\n930\t    }\n931\t\n932\t    if (riskAssessment.recommendedAction === \"challenge\" && reauthOnHighRisk) {\n933\t      // Require re-authentication for high-risk sessions\n934\t      securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n935\t        c,\n936\t        \"high_risk_session_challenge\",\n937\t        `Re-authentication required due to risk score: ${riskAssessment.riskScore}`\n938\t      );\n939\t      throw new Error(\"Re-authentication required\");\n940\t    }\n941\t\n942\t    return next();\n943\t  };\n944\t}\n945\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"19b864e5-f5f9-4747-afef-54b401f04266","uuid":"7c1701c1-88b0-446c-baf7-689c21ad5f17","timestamp":"2026-05-09T05:25:27.107Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/mta-my-way/packages/server/src/middleware/session-security.ts","content":"/**\n * Enhanced session security utilities.\n *\n * Provides advanced security features for session management including:\n * - IP address validation and subnet matching\n * - User agent analysis and fingerprinting\n * - Geolocation-based security checks\n * - Impossible travel detection\n * - Session risk scoring\n * - Device trust management\n *\n * These utilities complement the core authentication system with\n * additional security layers for detecting and preventing session hijacking.\n */\n\nimport { logger } from \"../observability/logger.js\";\nimport type { AuthSession } from \"./authentication.js\";\nimport { securityLogger } from \"./security-logging.js\";\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Types and Interfaces\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * IP address type.\n */\nexport type IpType = \"ipv4\" | \"ipv6\" | \"unknown\";\n\n/**\n * IP address information.\n */\nexport interface IpInfo {\n  /** The IP address */\n  ip: string;\n  /** IP type (IPv4 or IPv6) */\n  type: IpType;\n  /** IPv4 octets (for IPv4 addresses) */\n  octets?: number[];\n  /** IPv6 hextets (for IPv6 addresses) */\n  hextets?: string[];\n  /** Whether this is a private/local IP */\n  isPrivate: boolean;\n  /** Whether this is a loopback IP */\n  isLoopback: boolean;\n}\n\n/**\n * IP subnet definition.\n */\nexport interface IpSubnet {\n  /** IP address */\n  ip: string;\n  /** CIDR prefix length (e.g., 24 for /24) */\n  prefixLength: number;\n}\n\n/**\n * User agent analysis result.\n */\nexport interface UserAgentInfo {\n  /** Full user agent string */\n  raw: string;\n  /** Browser family */\n  browser?: string;\n  /** Browser version (if detectable) */\n  browserVersion?: string;\n  /** OS family */\n  os?: string;\n  /** OS version (if detectable) */\n  osVersion?: string;\n  /** Device type */\n  deviceType: \"mobile\" | \"tablet\" | \"desktop\" | \"bot\" | \"unknown\";\n  /** Device hardware info (if available) */\n  hardware?: string;\n}\n\n/**\n * Geolocation data (simplified).\n */\nexport interface GeolocationData {\n  /** Country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2) */\n  country?: string;\n  /** City name */\n  city?: string;\n  /** Latitude */\n  latitude?: number;\n  /** Longitude */\n  longitude?: number;\n  /** Approximate timezone */\n  timezone?: string;\n}\n\n/**\n * Security event for risk scoring.\n */\nexport interface SecurityEvent {\n  /** Event type */\n  type: string;\n  /** Event timestamp */\n  timestamp: number;\n  /** Risk score contribution */\n  score: number;\n  /** Event details */\n  details?: Record<string, unknown>;\n}\n\n/**\n * Session risk assessment.\n */\nexport interface SessionRiskAssessment {\n  /** Overall risk score (0-100) */\n  riskScore: number;\n  /** Risk level */\n  riskLevel: \"low\" | \"medium\" | \"high\" | \"critical\";\n  /** Risk factors identified */\n  riskFactors: string[];\n  /** Recommended action */\n  recommendedAction: \"allow\" | \"monitor\" | \"challenge\" | \"block\";\n  /** Security events that contributed to the score */\n  events: SecurityEvent[];\n}\n\n/**\n * Device trust level.\n */\nexport type DeviceTrustLevel = \"unknown\" | \"untrusted\" | \"trusted\" | \"highly_trusted\";\n\n/**\n * Device trust information.\n */\nexport interface DeviceTrustInfo {\n  /** Device ID */\n  deviceId: string;\n  /** Trust level */\n  trustLevel: DeviceTrustLevel;\n  /** First seen timestamp */\n  firstSeenAt: number;\n  /** Last seen timestamp */\n  lastSeenAt: number;\n  /** Number of successful authentications */\n  successfulAuths: number;\n  /** Last risk assessment */\n  lastRiskAssessment?: SessionRiskAssessment;\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// IP Address Utilities\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Parse an IP address into its components.\n */\nexport function parseIpAddress(ip: string): IpInfo {\n  if (ip.includes(\".\")) {\n    // IPv4\n    const octets = ip.split(\".\").map((n) => parseInt(n, 10));\n\n    return {\n      ip,\n      type: \"ipv4\",\n      octets,\n      isPrivate: isPrivateIpv4(octets),\n      isLoopback: octets[0] === 127,\n    };\n  }\n\n  if (ip.includes(\":\")) {\n    // IPv6\n    const hextets = ip.split(\":\");\n\n    return {\n      ip,\n      type: \"ipv6\",\n      hextets,\n      isPrivate: ip.startsWith(\"fc\") || ip.startsWith(\"fd\") || ip.startsWith(\"fe80\"),\n      isLoopback: ip === \"::1\",\n    };\n  }\n\n  return {\n    ip,\n    type: \"unknown\",\n    isPrivate: false,\n    isLoopback: false,\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if IPv4 address is private.\n */\nfunction isPrivateIpv4(octets: number[]): boolean {\n  const [first, second] = octets;\n\n  // 10.0.0.0/8\n  if (first === 10) return true;\n\n  // 172.16.0.0/12\n  if (first === 172 && second >= 16 && second <= 31) return true;\n\n  // 192.168.0.0/16\n  if (first === 192 && second === 168) return true;\n\n  // 169.254.0.0/16 (link-local)\n  if (first === 169 && second === 254) return true;\n\n  return false;\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if two IP addresses are in the same subnet.\n *\n * For IPv4, checks the specified number of leading octets.\n * For IPv6, checks the specified number of leading hextets.\n */\nexport function areIpsInSameSubnet(ip1: string, ip2: string, prefixLength = 24): boolean {\n  const info1 = parseIpAddress(ip1);\n  const info2 = parseIpAddress(ip2);\n\n  if (info1.type !== info2.type || info1.type === \"unknown\") {\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  if (info1.type === \"ipv4\" && info1.octets && info2.octets) {\n    // For IPv4, prefixLength / 8 gives number of octets to compare\n    const octetsToCompare = Math.floor(prefixLength / 8);\n\n    for (let i = 0; i < octetsToCompare && i < 4; i++) {\n      if (info1.octets[i] !== info2.octets[i]) {\n        return false;\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Check remaining bits\n    const remainingBits = prefixLength % 8;\n    if (remainingBits > 0 && octetsToCompare < 4) {\n      const mask = 256 - Math.pow(2, 8 - remainingBits);\n      if ((info1.octets[octetsToCompare]! & mask) !== (info2.octets[octetsToCompare]! & mask)) {\n        return false;\n      }\n    }\n\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  if (info1.type === \"ipv6\" && info1.hextets && info2.hextets) {\n    // For IPv6, prefixLength / 16 gives number of hextets to compare\n    const hextetsToCompare = Math.floor(prefixLength / 16);\n\n    for (let i = 0; i < hextetsToCompare && i < 8; i++) {\n      if (info1.hextets[i] !== info2.hextets[i]) {\n        return false;\n      }\n    }\n\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  return false;\n}\n\n/**\n * Calculate the distance between two IP addresses.\n *\n * Returns a normalized \"distance\" value (0-100) based on how different the IPs are.\n * Useful for detecting proxy/VPN changes vs. location changes.\n */\nexport function calculateIpDistance(ip1: string, ip2: string): number {\n  const info1 = parseIpAddress(ip1);\n  const info2 = parseIpAddress(ip2);\n\n  if (info1.type !== info2.type || info1.type === \"unknown\") {\n    return 100; // Maximum distance for different IP types\n  }\n\n  if (info1.type === \"ipv4\" && info1.octets && info2.octets) {\n    // Calculate difference for each octet\n    let totalDiff = 0;\n    for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {\n      totalDiff += Math.abs(info1.octets[i]! - info2.octets[i]!);\n    }\n\n    // Normalize to 0-100\n    return Math.min(100, Math.floor(totalDiff / 2.55));\n  }\n\n  return 50; // Middle distance for IPv6 (simplified)\n}\n\n/**\n * Get a simplified IP class for grouping.\n *\n * Returns \"A\", \"B\", \"C\" class for IPv4, useful for coarse-grained comparison.\n */\nexport function getIpClass(ip: string): string {\n  const info = parseIpAddress(ip);\n\n  if (info.type === \"ipv4\" && info.octets) {\n    const [first] = info.octets;\n\n    if (first < 128) return \"A\";\n    if (first < 192) return \"B\";\n    return \"C\";\n  }\n\n  return \"unknown\";\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// User Agent Analysis\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Analyze a user agent string.\n */\nexport function analyzeUserAgent(userAgent: string): UserAgentInfo {\n  const ua = userAgent.toLowerCase();\n  const info: UserAgentInfo = {\n    raw: userAgent,\n    deviceType: \"unknown\",\n  };\n\n  // Detect browser\n  if (ua.includes(\"edg/\") || ua.includes(\"edge/\")) {\n    info.browser = \"edge\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"opr/\") || ua.includes(\"opera/\")) {\n    info.browser = \"opera\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"brave/\")) {\n    info.browser = \"brave\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"chrome/\") && !ua.includes(\"edg\")) {\n    info.browser = \"chrome\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"safari/\") && !ua.includes(\"chrome\")) {\n    info.browser = \"safari\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"firefox/\")) {\n    info.browser = \"firefox\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"trident/\") || ua.includes(\"msie\")) {\n    info.browser = \"ie\";\n  }\n\n  // Detect OS\n  if (ua.includes(\"windows\")) {\n    info.os = \"windows\";\n    if (ua.includes(\"windows nt 10.0\")) info.osVersion = \"10\";\n    else if (ua.includes(\"windows nt 6.3\")) info.osVersion = \"8.1\";\n    else if (ua.includes(\"windows nt 6.1\")) info.osVersion = \"7\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"iphone\") || ua.includes(\"ipad\") || ua.includes(\"ipod\")) {\n    info.os = \"ios\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"android\")) {\n    info.os = \"android\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"mac os x\") || ua.includes(\"macos\")) {\n    info.os = \"macos\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"linux\")) {\n    info.os = \"linux\";\n  }\n\n  // Detect device type\n  if (/bot|crawl|spider|slurp|curl|wget/i.test(userAgent)) {\n    info.deviceType = \"bot\";\n  } else if (/tablet|ipad|playbook|silk/i.test(ua)) {\n    info.deviceType = \"tablet\";\n  } else if (/mobile|android|iphone|ipod|blackberry|iemobile|opera mini/i.test(ua)) {\n    info.deviceType = \"mobile\";\n  } else if (info.os) {\n    info.deviceType = \"desktop\";\n  }\n\n  // Detect hardware\n  if (ua.includes(\"arm\")) {\n    info.hardware = \"arm\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"x86_64\") || ua.includes(\"x64\") || ua.includes(\"wow64\")) {\n    info.hardware = \"x64\";\n  } else if (ua.includes(\"i686\") || ua.includes(\"x86\")) {\n    info.hardware = \"x86\";\n  }\n\n  return info;\n}\n\n/**\n * Calculate similarity between two user agent strings.\n *\n * Returns 0-100 similarity score.\n */\nexport function calculateUserAgentSimilarity(ua1: string, ua2: string): number {\n  const info1 = analyzeUserAgent(ua1);\n  const info2 = analyzeUserAgent(ua2);\n\n  let similarity = 0;\n  let factors = 0;\n\n  // Browser match\n  if (info1.browser === info2.browser) {\n    similarity += 30;\n  }\n  factors++;\n\n  // OS match\n  if (info1.os === info2.os) {\n    similarity += 30;\n  }\n  factors++;\n\n  // Device type match\n  if (info1.deviceType === info2.deviceType) {\n    similarity += 20;\n  }\n  factors++;\n\n  // Hardware match\n  if (info1.hardware === info2.hardware) {\n    similarity += 20;\n  }\n  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars\n  factors++;\n\n  return Math.min(100, similarity);\n}\n\n/**\n * Detect if user agent change is legitimate.\n *\n * Returns true if the change is likely a browser update or minor version change.\n */\nexport function isLegitimateUserAgentChange(oldUa: string, newUa: string): boolean {\n  const oldInfo = analyzeUserAgent(oldUa);\n  const newInfo = analyzeUserAgent(newUa);\n\n  // Same browser and OS is likely a version update\n  if (oldInfo.browser === newInfo.browser && oldInfo.os === newInfo.os) {\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  // Same device type with different browser could be user trying new browser\n  if (oldInfo.deviceType === newInfo.deviceType && oldInfo.os === newInfo.os) {\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  return false;\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Session Risk Assessment\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Security event tracking for session risk scoring.\n */\nconst sessionSecurityEvents = new Map<string, SecurityEvent[]>();\n\n/**\n * Assess session security risk.\n *\n * Analyzes a session and current request to calculate a risk score.\n */\nexport async function assessSessionRisk(\n  session: AuthSession,\n  currentIp: string,\n  currentUserAgent?: string,\n  options: {\n    /** Time window for event history (ms) */\n    eventHistoryWindow?: number;\n    /** Whether to include geolocation checks */\n    includeGeolocation?: boolean;\n    /** Known geolocation data (optional) */\n    knownGeo?: (ip: string) => Promise<GeolocationData | null>;\n  } = {}\n): Promise<SessionRiskAssessment> {\n  const {\n    eventHistoryWindow = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000, // 24 hours\n    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars\n    includeGeolocation = false,\n    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars\n    knownGeo,\n  } = options;\n\n  const riskFactors: string[] = [];\n  const events: SecurityEvent[] = [];\n  let riskScore = 0;\n\n  const now = Date.now();\n\n  // Get recent security events for this session\n  const recentEvents = (sessionSecurityEvents.get(session.sessionId) || []).filter(\n    (e) => now - e.timestamp < eventHistoryWindow\n  );\n\n  // Check IP change\n  if (session.clientIp !== currentIp) {\n    const ipInfo = parseIpAddress(currentIp);\n    const oldIpInfo = parseIpAddress(session.clientIp);\n\n    if (ipInfo.type !== oldIpInfo.type) {\n      riskScore += 40;\n      riskFactors.push(\"IP address type changed (IPv4 ↔ IPv6)\");\n      events.push({\n        type: \"ip_type_change\",\n        timestamp: now,\n        score: 40,\n        details: { oldIp: session.clientIp, newIp: currentIp },\n      });\n    } else if (!areIpsInSameSubnet(session.clientIp, currentIp, 24)) {\n      riskScore += 30;\n      riskFactors.push(\"IP address changed to different subnet\");\n      events.push({\n        type: \"ip_subnet_change\",\n        timestamp: now,\n        score: 30,\n        details: { oldIp: session.clientIp, newIp: currentIp },\n      });\n    } else {\n      riskScore += 10;\n      riskFactors.push(\"IP address changed within same subnet\");\n      events.push({\n        type: \"ip_change_same_subnet\",\n        timestamp: now,\n        score: 10,\n        details: { oldIp: session.clientIp, newIp: currentIp },\n      });\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Check User-Agent change\n  if (currentUserAgent && session.userAgent && session.userAgent !== currentUserAgent) {\n    const similarity = calculateUserAgentSimilarity(session.userAgent, currentUserAgent);\n\n    if (similarity < 50) {\n      riskScore += 30;\n      riskFactors.push(\"User-Agent changed significantly\");\n      events.push({\n        type: \"ua_change_major\",\n        timestamp: now,\n        score: 30,\n        details: { oldUa: session.userAgent, newUa: currentUserAgent, similarity },\n      });\n    } else if (!isLegitimateUserAgentChange(session.userAgent, currentUserAgent)) {\n      riskScore += 15;\n      riskFactors.push(\"User-Agent changed (possibly suspicious)\");\n      events.push({\n        type: \"ua_change_minor\",\n        timestamp: now,\n        score: 15,\n        details: { oldUa: session.userAgent, newUa: currentUserAgent },\n      });\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Check session age (very new sessions are higher risk)\n  const sessionAge = now - session.createdAt;\n  if (sessionAge < 5 * 60 * 1000) {\n    // Less than 5 minutes old\n    riskScore += 5;\n    riskFactors.push(\"Very new session\");\n  }\n\n  // Check idle time (long idle may indicate hijacking)\n  const idleTime = now - session.lastActivityAt;\n  if (idleTime > 60 * 60 * 1000) {\n    // More than 1 hour idle\n    riskScore += 10;\n    riskFactors.push(\"Long idle time before activity\");\n  }\n\n  // Include recent security events\n  for (const event of recentEvents) {\n    riskScore += event.score;\n    events.push(event);\n  }\n\n  // Cap risk score at 100\n  riskScore = Math.min(100, riskScore);\n\n  // Determine risk level\n  let riskLevel: \"low\" | \"medium\" | \"high\" | \"critical\";\n  let recommendedAction: \"allow\" | \"monitor\" | \"challenge\" | \"block\";\n\n  if (riskScore < 20) {\n    riskLevel = \"low\";\n    recommendedAction = \"allow\";\n  } else if (riskScore < 50) {\n    riskLevel = \"medium\";\n    recommendedAction = \"monitor\";\n  } else if (riskScore < 80) {\n    riskLevel = \"high\";\n    recommendedAction = \"challenge\";\n  } else {\n    riskLevel = \"critical\";\n    recommendedAction = \"block\";\n  }\n\n  return {\n    riskScore,\n    riskLevel,\n    riskFactors,\n    recommendedAction,\n    events,\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Record a security event for a session.\n */\nexport function recordSecurityEvent(sessionId: string, event: SecurityEvent): void {\n  const events = sessionSecurityEvents.get(sessionId) || [];\n  events.push(event);\n\n  // Keep only last 100 events per session\n  if (events.length > 100) {\n    events.shift();\n  }\n\n  sessionSecurityEvents.set(sessionId, events);\n\n  logger.debug(\"Security event recorded\", {\n    sessionId,\n    eventType: event.type,\n    score: event.score,\n  });\n}\n\n/**\n * Clear security events for a session.\n */\nexport function clearSecurityEvents(sessionId: string): void {\n  sessionSecurityEvents.delete(sessionId);\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Device Trust Management\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Device trust storage.\n */\nconst deviceTrustStorage = new Map<string, DeviceTrustInfo>();\n\n/**\n * Get or create device trust info.\n */\nexport function getOrCreateDeviceTrust(\n  deviceId: string,\n  initialRiskAssessment?: SessionRiskAssessment\n): DeviceTrustInfo {\n  const existing = deviceTrustStorage.get(deviceId);\n\n  if (existing) {\n    return existing;\n  }\n\n  const trustInfo: DeviceTrustInfo = {\n    deviceId,\n    trustLevel: \"unknown\",\n    firstSeenAt: Date.now(),\n    lastSeenAt: Date.now(),\n    successfulAuths: 0,\n    lastRiskAssessment: initialRiskAssessment,\n  };\n\n  deviceTrustStorage.set(deviceId, trustInfo);\n\n  logger.info(\"New device trust record created\", { deviceId });\n\n  return trustInfo;\n}\n\n/**\n * Update device trust based on successful authentication.\n */\nexport function updateDeviceTrust(deviceId: string, riskAssessment?: SessionRiskAssessment): void {\n  const trustInfo = getOrCreateDeviceTrust(deviceId, riskAssessment);\n\n  // Ensure lastSeenAt is always at least 1ms after firstSeenAt\n  const now = Date.now();\n  trustInfo.lastSeenAt = Math.max(now, trustInfo.firstSeenAt + 1);\n  trustInfo.successfulAuths++;\n  trustInfo.lastRiskAssessment = riskAssessment;\n\n  // Auto-promote trust based on successful auths\n  if (trustInfo.successfulAuths >= 10 && trustInfo.trustLevel !== \"highly_trusted\") {\n    trustInfo.trustLevel = \"highly_trusted\";\n    logger.info(\"Device promoted to highly trusted\", { deviceId });\n  } else if (trustInfo.successfulAuths >= 5 && trustInfo.trustLevel === \"unknown\") {\n    trustInfo.trustLevel = \"trusted\";\n    logger.info(\"Device promoted to trusted\", { deviceId });\n  } else if (riskAssessment && riskAssessment.riskLevel === \"high\") {\n    trustInfo.trustLevel = \"untrusted\";\n    logger.warn(\"Device marked as untrusted due to high risk\", { deviceId });\n  }\n\n  deviceTrustStorage.set(deviceId, trustInfo);\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if a device is trusted.\n */\nexport function isDeviceTrusted(deviceId: string): boolean {\n  const trustInfo = deviceTrustStorage.get(deviceId);\n  return trustInfo?.trustLevel === \"trusted\" || trustInfo?.trustLevel === \"highly_trusted\";\n}\n\n/**\n * Get device trust level.\n */\nexport function getDeviceTrustLevel(deviceId: string): DeviceTrustLevel {\n  return deviceTrustStorage.get(deviceId)?.trustLevel || \"unknown\";\n}\n\n/**\n * Manually set device trust level.\n */\nexport function setDeviceTrustLevel(deviceId: string, trustLevel: DeviceTrustLevel): void {\n  const trustInfo = getOrCreateDeviceTrust(deviceId);\n  trustInfo.trustLevel = trustLevel;\n  deviceTrustStorage.set(deviceId, trustInfo);\n\n  logger.info(\"Device trust level manually set\", { deviceId, trustLevel });\n}\n\n/**\n * Remove device trust record.\n */\nexport function removeDeviceTrust(deviceId: string): void {\n  deviceTrustStorage.delete(deviceId);\n  logger.info(\"Device trust record removed\", { deviceId });\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Impossible Travel Detection\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Maximum plausible travel speed (km/h).\n * Commercial jets fly at ~900 km/h, so anything faster is suspicious.\n */\nconst MAX_PLAUSIBLE_SPEED_KMH = 900;\n\n/**\n * Check for impossible travel between two locations.\n *\n * Compares the time between two events with the distance between\n * their locations to detect impossible travel scenarios.\n */\nexport async function detectImpossibleTravel(\n  event1: { timestamp: number; ip: string; geo?: GeolocationData },\n  event2: { timestamp: number; ip: string; geo?: GeolocationData },\n  options: {\n    /** Maximum plausible speed (km/h) */\n    maxSpeedKmh?: number;\n    /** Geolocation lookup function */\n    geoLookup?: (ip: string) => Promise<GeolocationData | null>;\n  } = {}\n): Promise<{ impossible: boolean; speed?: number; distance?: number }> {\n  const { maxSpeedKmh = MAX_PLAUSIBLE_SPEED_KMH, geoLookup } = options;\n\n  // Ensure event1 is earlier\n  const [earlier, later] =\n    event1.timestamp < event2.timestamp ? [event1, event2] : [event2, event1];\n\n  // Get geolocation data\n  const geo1 = event1.geo || (geoLookup ? await geoLookup(event1.ip) : null);\n  const geo2 = event2.geo || (geoLookup ? await geoLookup(event2.ip) : null);\n\n  if (!geo1 || !geo2 || !geo1.latitude || !geo1.longitude || !geo2.latitude || !geo2.longitude) {\n    // Can't determine without geolocation\n    return { impossible: false };\n  }\n\n  // Calculate distance using Haversine formula\n  const distance = calculateDistance(geo1.latitude, geo1.longitude, geo2.latitude, geo2.longitude);\n\n  // Calculate time difference in hours\n  const timeDiffHours = (later.timestamp - earlier.timestamp) / (1000 * 60 * 60);\n\n  if (timeDiffHours <= 0) {\n    // Events at the same time or reversed timestamps\n    return { impossible: false };\n  }\n\n  // Calculate required speed\n  const speed = distance / timeDiffHours;\n\n  if (speed > maxSpeedKmh) {\n    return { impossible: true, speed, distance };\n  }\n\n  return { impossible: false, speed, distance };\n}\n\n/**\n * Calculate distance between two coordinates using the Haversine formula.\n *\n * Returns distance in kilometers.\n */\nexport function calculateDistance(lat1: number, lon1: number, lat2: number, lon2: number): number {\n  const R = 6371; // Earth's radius in km\n  const dLat = toRadians(lat2 - lat1);\n  const dLon = toRadians(lon2 - lon1);\n\n  const a =\n    Math.sin(dLat / 2) * Math.sin(dLat / 2) +\n    Math.cos(toRadians(lat1)) * Math.cos(toRadians(lat2)) * Math.sin(dLon / 2) * Math.sin(dLon / 2);\n\n  const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));\n\n  return R * c;\n}\n\n/**\n * Convert degrees to radians.\n */\nfunction toRadians(degrees: number): number {\n  return degrees * (Math.PI / 180);\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Middleware Integration\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Session security middleware options.\n */\nexport interface SessionSecurityMiddlewareOptions {\n  /** Whether to enforce IP binding */\n  enforceIpBinding?: boolean;\n  /** Whether to check user agent changes */\n  checkUserAgent?: boolean;\n  /** Risk threshold for blocking (0-100) */\n  riskThreshold?: number;\n  /** Whether to require re-authentication on high risk */\n  reauthOnHighRisk?: boolean;\n}\n\n/**\n * Session security middleware.\n *\n * Enhances session validation with risk assessment and additional security checks.\n */\nexport function sessionSecurity(options: SessionSecurityMiddlewareOptions = {}) {\n  const {\n    enforceIpBinding = true,\n    checkUserAgent = true,\n    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars\n    riskThreshold = 80,\n    reauthOnHighRisk = true,\n  } = options;\n\n  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\n  return async (c: any, next: any) => {\n    const session = c.get(\"session\");\n    if (!session) {\n      return next();\n    }\n\n    const clientIp =\n      c.req.header(\"CF-Connecting-IP\") ||\n      c.req.header(\"X-Forwarded-For\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() ||\n      c.req.header(\"X-Real-IP\") ||\n      \"unknown\";\n\n    const userAgent = c.req.header(\"User-Agent\");\n\n    // Enforce IP binding if enabled and session has ipBinding set\n    if (enforceIpBinding && session.ipBinding && session.clientIp) {\n      // Check if IP is in the same /24 subnet (allows for DHCP changes within same network)\n      const ipInfo = parseIpAddress(clientIp);\n      const sessionIpInfo = parseIpAddress(session.clientIp);\n\n      if (ipInfo.type === sessionIpInfo.type && ipInfo.type === \"ipv4\") {\n        // For IPv4, check if within same /24 subnet (first 3 octets match)\n        const ipsInSameSubnet = areIpsInSameSubnet(session.clientIp, clientIp, 24);\n\n        if (!ipsInSameSubnet) {\n          securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n            c,\n            \"ip_binding_violation\",\n            `Session IP binding violation: ${session.clientIp} -> ${clientIp}`\n          );\n          throw new Error(\"Session IP binding violation - session terminated\");\n        }\n      } else if (ipInfo.type === sessionIpInfo.type && ipInfo.type === \"ipv6\") {\n        // For IPv6, check if within same /64 subnet\n        const ipsInSameSubnet = areIpsInSameSubnet(session.clientIp, clientIp, 64);\n\n        if (!ipsInSameSubnet) {\n          securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n            c,\n            \"ip_binding_violation\",\n            `Session IP binding violation: ${session.clientIp} -> ${clientIp}`\n          );\n          throw new Error(\"Session IP binding violation - session terminated\");\n        }\n      } else if (ipInfo.type !== sessionIpInfo.type) {\n        // IP type changed (IPv4 <-> IPv6)\n        securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n          c,\n          \"ip_type_change\",\n          `Session IP type change: ${sessionIpInfo.type} -> ${ipInfo.type}`\n        );\n        throw new Error(\"Session IP type changed - session terminated\");\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Check User-Agent changes if enabled\n    if (checkUserAgent && session.userAgent && userAgent !== session.userAgent) {\n      const similarity = calculateUserAgentSimilarity(session.userAgent, userAgent);\n\n      // Significant user agent change without being a legitimate update\n      if (similarity < 50 && !isLegitimateUserAgentChange(session.userAgent, userAgent)) {\n        securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n          c,\n          \"user_agent_change\",\n          `Suspicious User-Agent change detected`\n        );\n        // Log but don't necessarily block - will be factored into risk assessment\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Assess session risk\n    const riskAssessment = await assessSessionRisk(session, clientIp, userAgent);\n\n    // Attach risk assessment to context\n    c.set(\"sessionRiskAssessment\", riskAssessment);\n\n    // Take action based on risk level\n    if (riskAssessment.recommendedAction === \"block\") {\n      securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n        c,\n        \"high_risk_session_blocked\",\n        `Session blocked due to high risk score: ${riskAssessment.riskScore}`\n      );\n      throw new Error(\"Session blocked due to suspicious activity\");\n    }\n\n    if (riskAssessment.recommendedAction === \"challenge\" && reauthOnHighRisk) {\n      // Require re-authentication for high-risk sessions\n      securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n        c,\n        \"high_risk_session_challenge\",\n        `Re-authentication required due to risk score: ${riskAssessment.riskScore}`\n      );\n      throw new Error(\"Re-authentication required\");\n    }\n\n    return next();\n  };\n}\n","numLines":945,"startLine":1,"totalLines":945}}}

============================================================================\n21\t\n22\t/**\n23\t * Time-based access control rules.\n24\t */\n25\texport interface TimeBasedAccessRule {\n26\t  /** */\n60\t  riskLevel: \"low\" | \"medium\" | \"high\" | \"critical\";\n61\t  /** Risk factors identified */\n62\t  riskFactors: string[];\n63\t  /** Recommended action */\n64\t  recommendedAction: lastAccessAt: number;\n79\t  /** Access locations (IPs) */\n80\t  accessLocations: Set<string>;\n81\t}\n82\t\n83\t// ============================================================================\n84\t// Time-Based Access Control\n85\t// ============================================================================\n86\t\n87\t/**\n88\t * Check if current time allows access based on time-based rules.\n89\t *\n90\t * @param rules - Time-based access rules\n91\t * @returns true if access is allowed, false otherwise\n92\t */\n93\texport function checkTimeBasedAccess(rules: TimeBasedAccessRule): boolean {\n94\t  const now = new Date();\n95\t  const timezone = rules.timezone || \"UTC\";\n96\t\n97\t  // Get current time in specified timezone\n98\t  const currentTime = new Date(now.toLocaleString(\"en-US\", { timeZone: timezone }));\n99\t\n100\t  const currentDay = currentTime.getDay();\n101\t  const currentHour = currentTime.getHours();\n102\t\n103\t  // Check exceptions first\n104\t  if (rules.exceptions) {\n105\t    const currentDateStr = now.toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n106\t    const exception = rules.exceptions.find((e) => e.date === currentDateStr);\n107\t    if (exception) {\n108\t      return exception.allowed;\n109\t    }\n110\t  }\n111\t\n112\t  // Check allowed days\n113\t  if (rules.allowedDays && !rules.allowedDays.includes(currentDay)) {\n114\t    return false;\n115\t  }\n116\t\n117\t  // Check allowed hours\n118\t  if (rules.allowedHours) {\n119\t    const { start, end } = rules.allowedHours;\n120\t    if (end < start) {\n121\t      // Range wraps around midnight (e.g., 22:00 - 06:00)\n122\t      if (currentHour < start && currentHour > end) {\n123\t        return false;\n124\t      }\n125\t    } else {\n126\t      // Normal range (e.g., 09:00 - 17:00)\n127\t      if (currentHour < start || currentHour > end) {\n128\t        return false;\n129\t      }\n130\t    }\n131\t  }\n132\t\n133\t  return true;\n134\t}\n135\t\n136\t/**\n137\t * Create middleware for time-based access control.\n138\t *\n139\t * @param rules - Time-based access rules\n140\t */\n141\texport function requireTimeBasedAccess(rules: TimeBasedAccessRule) {\n142\t  return async (c: Context, next: () => Promise<void>) => {\n143\t    if (!checkTimeBasedAccess(rules)) {\n144\t      securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n145\t        c,\n146\t        \"time_based_access_denied\",\n147\t        \"Access denied due to time-based restrictions\"\n148\t      );\n149\t      throw new HTTPException(403, {\n150\t        message: \"Access is not allowed at this time\",\n151\t      });\n152\t    }\n153\t    return next();\n154\t  };\n155\t}\n156\t\n157\t// ============================================================================\n158\t// Location-Based Access Control\n159\t// ============================================================================\n160\t\n161\t/**\n162\t * Extract country code from IP address (simplified).\n163\t * In production, use a proper GeoIP database.\n164\t *\n165\t * @param ip - IP address\n166\t * @returns Country code or null\n167\t */\n168\tfunction extractCountryFromIp(_ip: string): string | null {\n169\t  // Simplified implementation - in production, use GeoIP database\n170\t  // This is a placeholder that returns null (no location data)\n171\t  return null;\n172\t}\n173\t\n174\t/**\n175\t * Check if IP address is in private range.\n176\t *\n177\t * @param ip - IP address\n178\t * @returns true if private IP\n179\t */\n180\tfunction isPrivateIp(ip: string): boolean {\n181\t  const parts = ip.split(\".\");\n182\t  if (parts.length !== 4) return false;\n183\t\n184\t  const [first, second] = parts.map((p) => parseInt(p, 10));\n185\t\n186\t  // 10.0.0.0/8\n187\t  if (first === 10) return true;\n188\t\n189\t  // 172.16.0.0/12\n190\t  if (first === 172 && second !== undefined && second >= 16 && second <= 31) {\n191\t    return true;\n192\t  }\n193\t\n194\t  // 192.168.0.0/16\n195\t  if (first === 192 && second === 168) return true;\n196\t\n197\t  return false;\n198\t}\n199\t\n200\t/**\n201\t * Check IP against trusted ranges.\n202\t *\n203\t * @param ip - IP address to check\n204\t * @param trustedRanges - Trusted IP ranges\n205\t * @returns true if IP is in trusted range\n206\t */\n207\tfunction isIpInTrustedRange(\n208\t  ip: string,\n209\t  trustedRanges: Array<{ ip: string; prefixLength: number }>\n210\t): boolean {\n211\t  for (const range of trustedRanges) {\n212\t    const ipParts = ip.split(\".\").map((p) => parseInt(p, 10));\n213\t    const rangeIpParts = range.ip.split(\".\").map((p) => parseInt(p, 10));\n214\t\n215\t    if (ipParts.length !== 4 || rangeIpParts.length !== 4) continue;\n216\t\n217\t    const octetsToCheck = Math.floor(range.prefixLength / 8);\n218\t    let match = true;\n219\t\n220\t    for (let i = 0; i < octetsToCheck && i < 4; i++) {\n221\t      if (ipParts[i] !== rangeIpParts[i]) {\n222\t        match = false;\n223\t        break;\n224\t      }\n225\t    }\n226\t\n227\t    if (match) return true;\n228\t  }\n229\t\n230\t  return false;\n231\t}\n232\t\n233\t/**\n234\t * Check if location allows access based on location-based rules.\n235\t *\n236\t * @param clientIp - Client IP address\n237\t * @param rules - Location-based access rules\n238\t * @returns true if access is allowed, false otherwise\n239\t */\n240\texport function checkLocationAccess(clientIp: string, rules: LocationAccessRule): boolean {\n241\t  // Check private connection requirement\n242\t  if (rules.requirePrivateConnection && !isPrivateIp(clientIp)) {\n243\t    return false;\n244\t  }\n245\t\n246\t  // Check trusted IP ranges\n247\t  if (rules.trustedIpRanges && isIpInTrustedRange(clientIp, rules.trustedIpRanges)) {\n248\t    return true;\n249\t  }\n250\t\n251\t  // Check country restrictions (if GeoIP is available)\n252\t  const country = extractCountryFromIp(clientIp);\n253\t  if (country) {\n254\t    if (rules.blockedCountries && rules.blockedCountries.includes(country)) {\n255\t      return false;\n256\t    }\n257\t\n258\t    if (rules.allowedCountries && !rules.allowedCountries.includes(country)) {\n259\t      return false;\n260\t    }\n261\t  }\n262\t\n263\t  return true;\n264\t}\n265\t\n266\t/**\n267\t * Create middleware for location-based access control.\n268\t *\n269\t * @param rules - Location-based access rules\n270\t */\n271\texport function requireLocationAccess(rules: LocationAccessRule) {\n272\t  return async (c: Context, next: () => Promise<void>) => {\n273\t    const clientIp =\n274\t      c.req.header(\"CF-Connecting-IP\") ||\n275\t      c.req.header(\"X-Forwarded-For\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() ||\n276\t      c.req.header(\"X-Real-IP\") ||\n277\t      \"unknown\";\n278\t\n279\t    if (!checkLocationAccess(clientIp, rules)) {\n280\t      securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n281\t        c,\n282\t        \"location_based_access_denied\",\n283\t        \"Access denied due to location restrictions\"\n284\t      );\n285\t      throw new HTTPException(403, {\n286\t        message: \"Access is not allowed from this location\",\n287\t      });\n288\t    }\n289\t    return next();\n290\t  };\n291\t}\n292\t\n293\t// ============================================================================\n294\t// Behavioral Analysis\n295\t// ============================================================================\n296\t\n297\t/**\n298\t * Access pattern tracking for anomaly detection.\n299\t */\n300\tconst accessPatterns = new Map<string, AccessPattern>();\n301\t\n302\t/**\n303\t * Analyze access behavior for anomalies.\n304\t *\n305\t * @param auth - Authentication context\n306\t * @param resourceType - Resource type being accessed\n307\t * @param clientIp - Client IP address\n308\t * @returns Behavioral analysis result\n309\t */\n310\texport function analyzeAccessBehavior(\n311\t  auth: AuthContext,\n312\t  resourceType: string,\n313\t  clientIp: string\n314\t): BehavioralAnalysis {\n315\t  const riskFactors: string[] = [];\n316\t  let riskScore = 0;\n317\t\n318\t  const key = `${auth.keyId}:${resourceType}`;\n319\t  const pattern = accessPatterns.get(key);\n320\t\n321\t  if (!pattern) {\n322\t    // First access - low risk\n323\t    return {\n324\t      riskScore: 0,\n325\t      riskLevel: \"low\",\n326\t      riskFactors: [],\n327\t      recommendedAction: \"allow\",\n328\t    };\n329\t  }\n330\t\n331\t  // Check access frequency\n332\t  const now = 0,\n552\t    issues,\n553\t    recommendations,\n554\t  };\n555\t}\n556\t\n557\t// ============================================================================\n558\t// Utility Functions\n559\t// (patternsByResourceType[pattern.resourceType] || 0) + 1;\n595\t  }\n596\t\n597\t  return {\n598\t    totalPatterns: accessPatterns.size,\n599\t    patternsByResourceType,\n600\t    averageAccessCount:
